caps.proposition_text: The clinician reports lower back pain.
The clinician assesses low back pain.

evidence.span_text: Low back pain, possible acute disc herniation.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician suspects acute disc herniation.

evidence.span_text: Low back pain, possible acute disc herniation.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician ordered an MRI of the lumbar spine.

evidence.span_text: After reviewing the patient's examination and radiographic findings today, I have had a lengthy discussion with the patient in regards to his current symptoms. His x-rays did not reveal any signs of a fracture. I would like to obtain an MRI of the lumbar spine to evaluate for a possible acute disc herniation. I have prescribed the patient meloxicam 15 mg to treat his pain. He will continue with physical therapy and a referral was provided for this today.
